## Source: ghsa-malware (8b3de3b54f7548eac79c0dbab60ebca0b80fa2cb91c3fc966592006ee067c9ec)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (d10fd2e8adb621ac6bb3b4cd31357213d90dd17f27cd1f01d5e8e7138686d7c2)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'newrubylogger' @ 99.9.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
